text: this is the checklist you need if you want to build a $200,069/mo mobile app:

there’s a mobile app niche no one’s touching.

imagine a food diary w/ AI:
- tracks how you feel
- detects bad food for you
- fixes your gut health

there are 0 competitors and a huge market (don’t track calories).

someone will make $$$ with this.

no one’s building a mobile app to fix yellow teeth.

1. scan your teeth
2. daily routine to fix
3. product suggestions

311k weekly searches + a SUPER relatable pain point that can blow up on shorts.

this is an EASY $50k/mo idea (look at taller).

i can’t believe no one’s building this mobile app.

1. scan your nails
2. health + type report
3. care products
4. nail style that fits you

“my type of nails” has 20M weekly searches and there are 0 competitors.

who’s building this $50k/mo app idea?

you can JUST build a mobile app with a mascot and make $$$.

> pick an app
> rebuild with a mascot
> quit bad habits = 0 competitors

it feels like taking care of someone and people come back daily for that -> HUGE retention.

what are you waiting for?

you can literally clone an app and start making $ from day 1.

1. take an idea (Cal AI)
2. make your own version (Bitepal)
3. don’t be a boring copy (Calz)

some “copies” are doing $400k mrr rn.

which app would you clone today?

i BEG you to build a viral feature + give free subs.

> niche first, like studytok
> visuals > everything else
> subs feel better when you EARN them

this mobile app is making $60,000/mo.

what do you think?

no one’s building mobile apps for boomers.

but they spend $ on:
- fishing gear
- bird feeders
- tarot readings

build something simple, let them share it with friends (they love bragging).

you’ve got a $5k/mo app idea.

stop overthinking, this is how you can promote your mobile app.

they’re doing 300k monthly downloads.

1. start with a curiosity hook
2. screen recording of your app

every comment will be “what app is this?” -> free engagement & virality.

what do you think?
